## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the compatibility impact.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] Relevant end-to-end or shell-execution tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation and examples reflect public behavior.

## Risk

Call out changes to shell quoting, exit status, package resolution, registry
authorization, migrations, or editor protocol behavior.
